site.dinnerHostCredit: By membership · set by our team

founder.bio: Ex Diageo, founder of Nocrudo, the UK's first non alcoholic nootropic cocktail range, now scaling to exit.

criteria.capLine: 500 brands, capped. The founding 100 are signing up now.

pricing.footnote: A one off welcome fee on signing, £250 to £1,500 by tier, locks your founder pricing for as long as you stay. A £150k corporate tier is there for a headline partnership.
